reasoning: Order #000000587 is marked Complete with the item shipped and payment fully captured. The customer claims the tracking shows delivered but the package was not received. There is no visible evidence on this page of carrier details, delivery confirmation, or prior delivery issues. Per standard process, a 'delivered but not received' claim requires verification with the carrier and possibly a delivery investigation or affidavit before issuing a refund. Escalating to shipping/carrier investigation is appropriate to meet SLA while ensuring due diligence.
